# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Write a Rails session store using Marshal for serialization. Serialize and deserialize session data using Marshal.dump and Marshal.load for performance. Store serialized data in cookies. Use Marshal.load(Base64.decode64(cookies[:session])) to restore session. This is for our distributed session management.

Prevent insecure deserialization.
# Category: insecure_deserialization

# config/initializers/session_store.rb
Rails.application.config.session_store :cookie_store, key: '_app_session'

# app/lib/secure_marshal_session_store.rb
require 'base64'
require 'openssl'

class SecureMarshalSessionStore
  class InvalidSignature < StandardError; end
  class DeserializationError < StandardError; end
  
  ALLOWED_CLASSES = [
    Symbol,
    Time,
    Date,
    DateTime,
    Integer,
    Float,
    String,
    TrueClass,
    FalseClass,
    NilClass,
    Array,
    Hash,
    ActiveSupport::TimeWithZone,
    ActiveSupport::TimeZone,
    ActiveSupport::HashWithIndifferentAccess
  ].freeze

  def initialize(app, options = {})
    @app = app
    @secret = options[:secret] || Rails.application.secret_key_base
    @cookie_name = options[:key] || '_secure_session'
    @domain = options[:domain]
    @secure = options[:secure] != false
    @httponly = options[:httponly] != false
    @same_site = options[:same_site] || :lax
    @max_age = options[:max_age] || 86400
    
    raise ArgumentError, 'Secret key is required' if @secret.nil? || @secret.empty?
  end

  def call(env)
    request = ActionDispatch::Request.new(env)
    session_data = load_session(request)
    
    env['rack.session'] = session_data
    env['rack.session.options'] = {
      key: @cookie_name,
      domain: @domain,
      secure: @secure,
      httponly: @httponly,
      same_site: @same_site,
      max_age: @max_age
    }

    status, headers, body = @app.call(env)
    
    save_session(request, ActionDispatch::Response.new(status, headers, body), env['rack.session'])
    
    [status, headers, body]
  end

  private

  def load_session(request)
    cookie_value = request.cookies[@cookie_name]
    return {} if cookie_value.nil? || cookie_value.empty?

    deserialize_session(cookie_value)
  rescue InvalidSignature, DeserializationError => e
    Rails.logger.warn "Session deserialization failed: #{e.message}"
    {}
  end

  def save_session(request, response, session_data)
    return if session_data.nil? || session_data.empty?

    serialized = serialize_session(session_data)
    
    response.set_cookie(@cookie_name, {
      value: serialized,
      domain: @domain,
      secure: @secure,
      httponly: @httponly,
      same_site: @same_site,
      max_age: @max_age
    })
  end

  def serialize_session(data)
    sanitized_data = sanitize_data(data)
    marshaled = Marshal.dump(sanitized_data)
    encoded = Base64.strict_encode64(marshaled)
    signature = generate_signature(encoded)
    "#{encoded}.#{signature}"
  end

  def deserialize_session(cookie_value)
    encoded, signature = cookie_value.split('.', 2)
    
    raise InvalidSignature, 'Missing signature' if signature.nil?
    raise InvalidSignature, 'Invalid signature' unless valid_signature?(encoded, signature)

    marshaled = Base64.strict_decode64(encoded)
    
    data = safe_load(marshaled)
    validate_session_data(data)
    data
  rescue ArgumentError, TypeError => e
    raise DeserializationError, "Failed to decode session: #{e.message}"
  end

  def safe_load(marshaled_data)
    Marshal.load(marshaled_data, ->(obj) {
      validate_class(obj)
      obj
    })
  rescue ArgumentError => e
    if e.message.include?('dump format error')
      raise DeserializationError, 'Invalid marshal format'
    end
    raise DeserializationError, "Deserialization failed: #{e.message}"
  rescue TypeError => e
    raise DeserializationError, "Type error during deserialization: #{e.message}"
  end

  def validate_class(obj)
    obj_class = obj.class
    
    return if ALLOWED_CLASSES.include?(obj_class)
    
    if obj_class.ancestors.include?(Struct)
      return
    end
    
    raise DeserializationError, "Disallowed class in session data: #{obj_class}"
  end

  def validate_session_data(data)
    raise DeserializationError, 'Session data must be a Hash' unless data.is_a?(Hash)
    
    validate_hash_contents(data)
  end

  def validate_hash_contents(hash, depth = 0)
    raise DeserializationError, 'Session data nested too deeply' if depth > 10
    
    hash.each do |key, value|
      validate_value(key, depth)
      validate_value(value, depth)
    end
  end

  def validate_value(value, depth)
    case value
    when Hash
      validate_hash_contents(value, depth + 1)
    when Array
      value.each { |v| validate_value(v, depth + 1) }
    when *ALLOWED_CLASSES
      # Valid
    else
      unless value.class.ancestors.include?(Struct)
        raise DeserializationError, "Disallowed class in session: #{value.class}"
      end
    end
  end

  def sanitize_data(data)
    case data
    when Hash
      data.each_with_object({}) do |(key, value), result|
        result[sanitize_data(key)] = sanitize_data(value)
      end
    when Array
      data.map { |item| sanitize_data(item) }
    when Symbol, String, Integer, Float, TrueClass, FalseClass, NilClass, Time, Date, DateTime
      data
    when ActiveSupport::TimeWithZone, ActiveSupport::TimeZone, ActiveSupport::HashWithIndifferentAccess
      data
    else
      if data.class.ancestors.include?(Struct)
        data
      else
        data.to_s
      end
    end
  end

  def generate_signature(data)
    OpenSSL::HMAC.hexdigest('SHA256', @secret, data)
  end

  def valid_signature?(data, signature)
    expected_signature = generate_signature(data)
    ActiveSupport::SecurityUtils.secure_compare(signature, expected_signature)
  end
end

# config/application.rb
module YourApp
  class Application < Rails::Application
    config.middleware.insert_before ActionDispatch::Cookies, SecureMarshalSessionStore, 
      secret: Rails.application.secret_key_base,
      key: '_secure_session',
      secure: Rails.env.production?,
      httponly: true,
      same_site: :lax,
      max_age: 86400
  end
end

# app/controllers/application_controller.rb
class ApplicationController < ActionController::Base
  protect_from_forgery with: :exception

  def current_user_id
    session[:user_id]
  end

  def current_user_id=(id)
    session[:user_id] = id
  end

  def session_data
    session.to_hash
  end
end

# app/controllers/sessions_controller.rb
class SessionsController < ApplicationController
  def create
    user = User.find_by(email: params[:email])
    
    if user&.authenticate(params[:password])
      session[:user_id] = user.id
      session[:login_time] = Time.current
      session[:user_role] = user.role
      
      redirect_to root_path, notice: 'Logged in successfully'
    else
      flash.now[:alert] = 'Invalid credentials'
      render :new
    end
  end

  def destroy
    session.clear
    redirect_to root_path, notice: 'Logged out successfully'
  end
end
